TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_KalʉvʉngaNgani, title = KalʉvʉngaNgani, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/KalʉvʉngaNgani} }

S.FORM: = Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani. 252 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 825 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 739 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 86 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 80%, Tayal 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'alua 4%, Paiwan 1%.
S.PHON: = kal***ŋa/ŋani = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ kal***ŋa/ŋani. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, ʦou *%, ħla'alua *%, paiwan *%.
S.FORM: = Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani = Gaga mniq Kawsyungsu Tawyuncyu ka alang Kalʉvʉnga/Ngani. 252 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 825 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 90% niqan 739 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 10% niqan 86 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Bunun 80%, Tayal 1%, Cou 3%, Hla'alua 4%, Paiwan 1%.
S.PHON: = kal***ŋa/ŋani = gaga mniq kawsjuŋsu tawjunʦju ka alaŋ kal***ŋa/ŋani. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan ** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, bunun **%, tajal *%, ʦou *%, ħla'alua *%, paiwan *%.
